file.content:
name: Test, Typecheck, and Lint

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node: [20, 22, 23]

    name: Node ${{ matrix.node }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Ensure apt-get is updated
        run: sudo apt-get update

      - name: Install xmllint
        run: sudo apt-get install -y libxml2-utils

      - name: Setup Node ${{ matrix.node }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm run test:no-lint

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: npm run typecheck

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Update apt and install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gnupg \
    ca-certificates \
    libxml2-utils \
    python3 \
    make \
    g++ \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Node.js 22
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Install npm dependencies
RUN npm ci

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Update apt and install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gnupg \
    ca-certificates \
    libxml2-utils \
    python3 \
    make \
    g++ \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Node.js 22
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Install npm dependencies
RUN npm ci

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
